name: Pagoda Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 strips bacon, cut crosswise into 1/4 inch wide pieces
6 green onions and tops, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in hot wok or large skillet over medium heat until crisp.
2. Add green onions and stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add egg and scramble.
4. Stir in rice and cook until heated through, gently separating grains.
5. Add soy sauce and stir until the mixture is well blended.
6. Serves: 4
